allow: Bash(node -e "const data=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(process.env.USERPROFILE+''/rc.json'',''utf8''\)\); const cats=[...new Set\(data.map\(e=>e.category\)\)]; console.log\(''Categories:'', cats\); console.log\(''---''\); data.filter\(e=>e.category===''VirtualSafetyCar''||e.message&&e.message.toUpperCase\(\).includes\(''VIRTUAL''\)\).forEach\(e=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(e\)\)\)")

Bash(npx tsx -e "import { prisma } from ''./scripts/_client.ts''; const d = await prisma.driver.findMany\({ where:{enabled:true}, orderBy:{number:''asc''}, include:{team:true} }\); d.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.id, x.number, x.name, x.team.name\)\); await prisma.$disconnect\(\);")
